hero_desc: Discover government benefits tailored for you in minutes, powered by intelligent AI matching.
form_desc: Provide your details securely to discover government schemes tailored for you.
form_secure: Your data is secure and encrypted
chat_welcome: Namaste! I am your AI SmartScheme Assistant. Tell me a bit about yourself (e.g., "I am 22 years old from Maharashtra, student") and I will find schemes for you!
chat_placeholder: E.g., I am a 30 yr old farmer from Punjab...
chat_error: I'm having a little trouble connecting to the master database right now. Please check your internet connection or try again in a few minutes.
directory_desc: Browse, filter, and discover over 500+ dynamic government schemes available for you.
ai_matcher_desc: Tell us who you are, we'll suggest the best schemes instantly.
no_matches_desc: Try adjusting your filters or search terms.
upload_instruction: Drag & drop files here, or click to select
apply_desc: Ensure you have attached the minimum required documents to begin the application tracking process.
exploring_sector: Browse government initiatives grouped by category
impact_desc: Making government schemes accessible to everyone
success_desc: See how citizens are transforming their lives
why_desc: The fastest way to unlock your rightful benefits
powered_by_ai: Powered by AI for Digital India
